keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal! Portland Timbers 0, Columbus Crew 1. Wessam Abou Ali (Columbus Crew) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal! Portland Timbers 1, Columbus Crew 1. Felipe Mora (Portland Timbers) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal. Assisted by Gage Guerra.
Goal! Portland Timbers 2, Columbus Crew 1. Antony (Portland Timbers) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Cole Bassett following a fast break.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Amar Sejdic replaces Dylan Chambost because of an injury.
Brandon Bye (Portland Timbers) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Portland Timbers 2, Columbus Crew 2. Diego Rossi (Columbus Crew) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Wessam Abou Ali.
Second Half begins Portland Timbers 2, Columbus Crew 2.
Wessam Abou Ali (Columbus Crew) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Yevhen Cheberko replaces Rudy Camacho.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Sékou Bangoura replaces Taha Habroune.
Substitution, Portland Timbers. Kevin Kelsy replaces Felipe Mora.
Substitution, Portland Timbers. Ariel Lassiter replaces Gage Guerra.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Jamal Thiaré replaces Wessam Abou Ali.
Substitution, Columbus Crew. Dániel Gazdag replaces Hugo Picard.
Substitution, Portland Timbers. Joao Ortiz replaces Antony.
Substitution, Portland Timbers. Kamal Miller replaces Alex Bonetig.
Goal! Portland Timbers 3, Columbus Crew 2. Ariel Lassiter (Portland Timbers) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Kevin Kelsy with a headed pass.
Substitution, Portland Timbers. Ian Smith replaces Kristoffer Velde.
Second Half ends, Portland Timbers 3, Columbus Crew 2.
